case_title: THOMAS A. O'KEEFE VS. AVIANCA S.A.

docket_entries.description: ORDER TO DISMISS WITHOUT PREJUDICE: NO APPEARANCES

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. NO APPEARANCES BY PLAINTIFF. NO APPEARANCES BY DEFENDANT. NO PROOF OF SERVICE ON FILE. JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID LAVINE; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)

ORDER TO CONTINUE FOR PROOF OF SERVICE.
